LAW AND MOTION 302,PLAINTIFF MARK SOUTER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THE DECLARATIONS OF PLAINTIFF (MARK SOUTER) AND DEFENDANT (PERRY LAW) CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT REGARDING WHETHER PLAINTIFF PERFORMED THE CONTRACT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: ANN DELGADO, CSR # 11185, TEL. NO. (951)764-4047

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication
Off Calendar Aug-05-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF MARK SOUTER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. The declarations of plaintiff (Mark Souter) and defendant (Perry Law) create a triable issue of material fact regarding whether plaintiff performed the contract. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order). Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 11185, Tel. No. (951)764-4047
